data.title: Trump's crypto adviser predicts Bitcoin bear market years away, analysts skeptical.
data.description: David Bailey, a prominent adviser in the crypto space under the Trump administration, predicts that a Bitcoin bear market is unlikely to occur for the next few years. However, market analysts are expressing skepticism regarding this forecast. Bailey's assertion indicates that he believes in the continued bullish trend of Bitcoin for the  coming years. This outlook contrasts with the cautionary stance adopted by analysts who foresee potential fluctuations in the cryptocurrency market despite Bailey's optimism. The differing opinions highlight the uncertainty and complexity surrounding the future trajectory of Bitcoin and other digital assets.

data.title: Analyst Willy Woo explains slow Bitcoin price rise, cites early hodlers' selling; OG whales hold BTC from 2011 at $10.
data.description: Cryptocurrency expert Willy Woo explained why Bitcoin's price is not increasing as rapidly as anticipated, pointing to the selling behaviors of early investors. Woo revealed that Bitcoin's supply is mostly held by original whales who obtained their holdings in 2011 when prices were $10 or less. To absorb each BTC these whales sell, it requires over $110,000 of fresh capital. This concentration of supply among OG whales is a key factor behind the sluggish rise in BTC value this cycle. Woo highlighted the challenge of absorbing the significant amounts of Bitcoin sold by these early investors who acquired their holdings at very low prices.

data.title: Cognite establishes Abu Dhabi entity to boost industrial AI adoption globally. #AI #AbuDhabi
data.description: Phoenix-based company Cognite has recently established a new entity in Abu Dhabi as part of its efforts to boost the adoption of industrial Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the region. This expansion marks a significant step in the company's global growth strategy. By setting up this new entity, Cognite aims to enhance its presence and offerings in Abu Dhabi and leverage the emerging opportunities in the industrial AI sector. This move reflects the company's commitment to driving innovation and supporting digital transformation within the region.

It is crucial that the critical support level at $0.35 remains intact to sustain this upward trend.

data.title: US government facing pressure as interest payments hit $1.2 trillion, may need lower rates to prevent debt from worsening.
data.description: The Kobeissi Letter recently pointed out that the U.S. government is facing increasing pressure from interest payments, with Federal Reserve potentially needing to make significant cuts to interest rates to avoid debt servicing becoming unmanageable. The post highlighted that U.S. Treasury interest payments have surged to a record $1.2 trillion in the past year according to Bank of America's Global Research team. It warned that if this trend continues, annual interest expenses could reach $1.4 trillion by 2026 if interest rates remain unchanged, emphasizing the strain of rising borrowing costs. The post emphasized the importance of the Fed lowering rates at its upcoming meeting to alleviate the financial burden on the government.
